name: Qwen2-VL
tagline: First Qwen2-generation VL models (2B/7B/72B) with dynamic-resolution vision and strong OCR.
metaDescription: Qwen2-VL (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2024-12 — part of the Qwen-VL line. First Qwen2-generation VL models (2B/7B/72B) with dynamic-resolution vision and strong…
overview: Qwen2-VL is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen-VL line. Released 2024-12. Vision-language models that read images, documents, charts and video and (from Qwen3-VL) act as visual agents.
What's notable in this version: First Qwen2-generation VL models (2B/7B/72B) with dynamic-resolution vision and strong OCR.
